meta.title: Use of a Rapid Acetoin Test in the Identification of Staphylococci and Micrococci

abstractHtml: In 269 parallel acetoin tests upon 212 strains of staphylococci and micrococci, 227 were positive by the 14-day tube method and 213 by a 2-day paper-disk method. Both tests showed the same percentage error in primary results.
